title: Throwable Fireballs
body:
# Throwable Fireballs
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/L3L1MCIUH)  
Makes fire charges shoot fireballs. Client-side not required.  
I made this mod because the other one available looked a bit dodgy.  
No extra functionality, no configuration.
